summary: Full testing of DesarrollosMX Phase 1-2. All backend APIs pass (9/9). Frontend landing page renders correctly with all required sections. Layer switcher works. Google OAuth redirect works correctly.

issues: H1 reads 'Conoce tu colonia antes de decidir.' - 'antes' has gradient text but the full H1 is split across lines. Requirement says gradient on 'antes' only - CONFIRMED WORKING correctly

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 367 lines - acceptable for Phase 1-2
All seed data uses in-memory Python lists (not MongoDB) - this is intentional per mocked_api note
Auth uses Emergent OAuth via session exchange - correct pattern
401 errors on /api/auth/me on page load are expected (unauthenticated user) - not a bug

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all sections render, layer switcher works, OAuth redirect works

test_credentials: Not required - public landing page, OAuth tested by redirect only
seed_data_creation: None - app uses in-memory seed data in server.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1-2 fully working. Backend: /api/health, /api/colonias (3 items), /api/properties (3 items) all return correct data. /api/auth/me returns 401 for unauthenticated (correct). Frontend: navbar, hero with gradient, score pills, partners row, SearchBar with tabs, LiveTicker marquee, ColoniasBento with working layer switcher (LIV/MOV/SEC/ECO shows different facts), ColoniaComparator SVG radar, PropertyListings 3-col, IntelligenceEngine score bars, Testimonials marquee, FAQ accordion, CTA footer - all present and functional. Google OAuth redirect to auth.emergentagent.com confirmed working.
